title: My Neighbor Totoro
description: Two sisters discover friendly forest spirits near their new home.

title: Spirited Away
description: A girl enters a spirit world and must save her parents.

title: Princess Mononoke
description: A young warrior is drawn into a conflict between nature and industry.

title: Kiki's Delivery Service
description: A young witch starts an independent delivery service in a seaside town.

title: Howl's Moving Castle
description: A young woman under a curse finds refuge in a magical moving castle.
